name: Dirt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the cream cheese and confectioners' sugar together in a bowl.
2. Gradually add dry pudding mix and milk, beating until smooth.
3. Fold in Cool Whip and vanilla extract. Chill mixture.
4. Grind Oreos into fine crumbs.
5. Layer the pudding mixture and cookie crumbs, with layers of cookies ending up on top.
